questions.scenario: The team wants to mix dev test files and production receipts in one bucket because prefixes are easy. What is the main review concern?

options.text: Bucket boundaries affect access, lifecycle, ownership, and review.
Production receipts must live in BigQuery.

questions.explanation: A bucket is a policy boundary as well as an object container.

questions.scenario: `devpolaris-orders-receipts-prod` is a bucket name. What does that name help humans see?

options.text: The bucket is a relational table.

questions.explanation: A good bucket name makes ownership and purpose visible.

options.text: The SQL schema for order rows.

questions.explanation: Bucket choices shape object storage behavior and policy.
